description_long: This house complex features a modern, low-rise architectural layout with multiple interconnected rectangular structures, each with flat roofs and a mix of open courtyards and green spaces. The property is enclosed by perimeter walls and includes landscaped gardens, several trees, and a central swimming pool. The buildings are finished in a combination of white, beige, and brown tones, with some sections featuring large windows and shaded outdoor areas. The layout is organized around a series of pathways and patios, providing access to various living spaces and amenities. The roofs are predominantly flat, with some sections having a slight elevation or overhang for shade. The overall design emphasizes open-air living, privacy, and integration with outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, low-rise house complex with flat roofs, open courtyards, landscaped gardens, and a central swimming pool, finished in white, beige, and brown tones.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from the front, highlighting the main entry, landscaped gardens, central pool, and the arrangement of interconnected flat-roofed structures.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear side, revealing additional green spaces, secondary structures, and the overall depth of the property.
description_view_2: View 2 offers a top-down perspective, clearly displaying the internal courtyards, pathways, and the spatial organization of the buildings.
description_view_3: View 3 shows the opposite side from the front, emphasizing the extended layout, more green areas, and the distribution of trees and patios.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a simple door, small steps, and minimal overhang, integrated into the landscaped front garden.
